message:
feat(core): expose pragma_state() accessor on Connection for harness introspection

Add a public `pragma_state()` method to `Connection` that returns a
`Ref<ConnectionPragmaState>`, allowing the E2E harness to inspect the
connection-scoped PRAGMA settings (journal_mode, synchronous, cache_size,
page_size, busy_timeout) after configuration. This enables the harness to
verify that both the sqlite3 and FrankenSQLite engines received identical
configuration before comparing their outputs — a key fairness invariant
for the RealDB E2E correctness pipeline (bd-1w6k.2.3).

Also simplifies `HarnessSettings::to_fsqlite_pragmas()` by removing a
needless mutable binding — the `let mut pragmas = vec![...]; pragmas`
pattern is replaced with a direct `vec![...]` return.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
